name: claude-codex
description: Codex skills and MCP tools for Claude Codex: API-key auth, chat, models, diagnostics.

interface.shortDescription: Claude Codex leaf provider for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Claude Codex provides Codex skills and an MCP stdio server for consent-gated chat, model listing, and diagnostics. Designed as a direct-callable leaf for multi-provider orchestration.
